query:
UPDATE requests
                    SET state = 'canceled',
                        canceled_at = COALESCE(canceled_at, NOW()),
                        daemon_id = NULL,
                        attempt_id = CASE
                            WHEN state = 'pending' THEN NULL
                            ELSE attempt_id
                        END,
                        processing_admission_id = NULL
                    WHERE batch_id = $1
                      AND state IN ('pending', 'claimed', 'processing')
